title: Limitbreak
description: Minecraft transformed into a roguelite wave-survival RPG with classes, relics, bosses, and permanent progression.
body:
## 📜 About
**LIMITBREAK** is a mechanic-heavy wave-based roguelite gamemode built for 2–6 players.

> Start with nothing and survive escalating waves of custom enemies. Build powerful combinations through classes, relics, enchantments, and gear as the arena becomes increasingly hostile.
> 
> Defeat powerful bosses every 20 waves, adapt your build to each run, and push towards Wave 100 where the final boss awaits. Every run is different, and every mistake can be fatal.
> 
> How far can you make it before the arena swallows you whole?

This datapack was made in **complete vanilla**, no plugins, mods, or dependencies required. Simply download the `.zip` file and drop it in the world's datapack folder.

<font color="#FFAA00">LIMITBREAK uses per-player commands for its classes, abilities, and mob behaviour. All players must be `/op` for these systems to function correctly.</font>

## 🗡️ Content

* **50+ Custom Mobs** featuring unique abilities, attack patterns, elite variants, and exclusive drops.
  
* **8 Specialized Classes** with distinct playstyles, progression paths, active abilities, and stat upgrades.

![Limitbreak Classes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/84179ea65b388737100a6f563feade8314bd8191.webp)

* **26+ Relics** that can dramatically alter your build through passive, conditional, or activated effects.
  
* **Hundreds of Custom Items** including weapons, enchantments, consumables, upgrades, and more.
  
* **Custom Armor Sets**, each offering powerful bonuses beyond Netherite equipment.
  
* **Dangerous Boss Encounters** with unique mechanics, attack phases, and arena-wide threats.

![Cinderstorm](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3d1ce3de99844b13955312c42e6fe3da4b004f32.webp)

* **Persistent Progression** through Credits, unlocks, world upgrades, and future runs.

![World Upgrades](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9fbd372502ad5800458909a8e4e60ee09a818ea1.webp)

## 📖 Guide

### Starting a Run

Spawn in the Hub and enter the teleporter to begin a run. Every player starts with no gear and must earn equipment, upgrades, and resources throughout the run.

### Core Gameplay

* Survive increasingly difficult waves of enemies.
* Earn Points by defeating mobs.
* Spend Points on upgrades, equipment, and other rewards.
* Defeat bosses every 20 waves to continue progressing.
* Discover relics, enchantments, and powerful gear to strengthen your build.
* Work together to survive as long as possible.

### Outcomes

- **Defeat**
If all players die, the run ends and everyone returns to the Hub. Points earned during the run are converted into Credits.

- **Victory**
Reach Wave 100 and defeat the final boss to complete the run. Successful runs award bonus Credits in addition to your earned Points.

### Useful Commands

* `/trigger ClassInfo` - View information about all available classes.
* `/trigger StatCheck` - View your current stats.
* `/trigger EndRun` - End the current run and return to the Hub.

## ⚠️ Warning
LIMITBREAK is developed solo as a hobby project. Updates are not on a regular schedule. Join the [Limitbreak Discord Server](https://discord.com/invite/sVw643RkCa) linked on this page for bug reports, questions, and feedback. I would genuinely appreciate it.

**Although there are versions with mod loaders, those versions are untested and its much more recommended to download the datapack versions.**

## 🪙 Credits
I used some online resources to develop this datapack, I would like to credit them in this section, check them out if you're interested.

#### Minecraft Heads (https://minecraft-heads.com/)

![Minecraft Heads](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e1183cf8a63419642c14daedb9eeddf1496f5f28_0.webp)

#### MCStacker (https://mcstacker.net/)

#### Misode Generators (https://misode.github.io/)

#### Cloud Wolf's Particle Plotter (https://cloudwolfyt.github.io/pages/gens/particle-plots.html)
